content.problemStatement:
Given $n$ ($n$ is **even**), determine the number of **black cells** in an $n \times n$ chessboard. \
Solve the problem.
content.inputFormat: The only line of the input contains a single integer $n$.
content.outputFormat: Output the number of black cells in an $n \times n$ chessboard.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There are $32$ black cells and $32$ white cells in an $8 \times 8$ chessboard. So the answer is $32$.
